title: tricliceras hirsutum
intro: Tricliceras hirsutum is a type of flowering plant, also known as the hairy tricliceras, that belongs to the family Passifloraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tricliceras hirsutum are associated with its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
